programme.title: Jaan-E-Mann: Let's Fall in Love... Again
programme.desc: To avoid paying a hefty alimony, Suhaan (Salman Khan) thinks of getting his ex-wife Pia (Preity Zinta) remarried. For that, he convinces Pia¡¯s simpleton college friend Agastya Rao (Akshay Kumar) that he can still marry his college crush. He then helps Agastya to woo Pia, but ends up falling in love with her all over again.

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: When the Municipal Corporation puts a hold on Sachin Tichkule's payment, a berk but ambitious municipal contractor, he decides to sue them. But matters worsen when the new municipal commissioner turns out to be his former girlfriend.

programme.title: Masti
programme.desc: Three henpecked friends tired of their respective marriage decide to spice up their lives by indulging in an extramarital affair. But things go downhill very quickly when they become the prime suspects in a deadly murder case.

programme.title: Billa 2
programme.desc: Small-time diamond smuggler David befriends Goa-based gangster Abbasi. However, when David begins to build inroads with an international criminal, Abbasi is not happy.

programme.title: Khadgam
programme.desc: An aspiring actor, a rickshaw driver and a police officer, have all been affected by terrorism. Circumstances bring them together and they decide to foil the plan of a dreaded terrorist.

programme.title: Muthu
programme.desc: A landlord and his loyal servant's equation turns sour as they fall in love with the same girl. Soon after the servant gets banished from the village, a mystery linked to his past comes pouring out.

programme.title: Super Hero Shehanshah
programme.desc: A mass entertainment action movie. A milkman moves to Chennai from the village and unwittingly stops a number of crimes. When a young journalist learns of this, she convinces him to become a superhero and fight for the common man.

programme.title: Caesar

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Teen Idol Tom
programme.desc: Actress Fiona Torrant is one of the elite orphans selected by the exclusive and powerful Font, the nations only academy for the arts, where stars are regularly groomed for enormous fame.

programme.title: Exo Planets
programme.desc: As scientists peer more closely at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets.

programme.title: Edge of the Universe
programme.desc: Most of what we see is actually dark matter and dark energy, but its nature eludes us... for the moment.

programme.title: Living with Space
programme.desc: With the wealth of experience behind Astronauts and Cosmonauts, what do they think when they return to Earth?

programme.title: Atmosphere
programme.desc: The envelope of gas surrounding our planet is a complex machine that protects us from the vacuum of space.

programme.title: Flight Status
programme.desc: New projects are advancing slowly, moving hardware into the testing phase, new designs, new capabilities.

programme.title: Invasion Mars
programme.desc: For over 50 years we have bombarded Mars with our probes and landers.

programme.title: Cubes
programme.desc: Tiny Satellites are growing in main stream popularity, and are being used for interplanetary missions as well.

programme.title: Proving Einstein
programme.desc: It appears that Einstein is once again triumphant as we discover the latest in deep space observations.

programme.title: Where are all the Aliens?
programme.desc: We're looking hard, but the numbers aren't stacking up. Is life on other planets really that hard to find?

programme.title: Return to Disaster
programme.desc: Relive the harrowing moments in Launch Control during NASA's second "Return to Flight" test flight .

programme.title: Mars or Bust
programme.desc: As the clock ticks toward the critical Mars launch window, NASA scrambles to fix a critical space mistake.

programme.title: Space Shuttle Shuffle
programme.desc: Despite multiple pressures, a shocking discovery causes NASA to cancel a historic launch.

programme.title: The End of Genesis
programme.desc: A spacecraft freefalls from orbit smashing into the ground when its parachute fails to deploy.

programme.title: Chain Letter
programme.desc: Six friends receive a mysterious chain letter via text and email from a maniac who hunts down those who delete the message. Who knew they should take the threats in the chain letter seriously or that their favorite technologies could help track and kill them?

programme.title: Hell's House
programme.desc: Jimmy idolizes bootlegger Matt, and when he refuses to implicate his friend, he is sent to reform school. He befriends Shorty, a boy with a heart condition, and escapes to let the world know about the brutal conditions.

programme.title: Name Escapes Me
programme.desc: A couple's fragile unity is threatened when a local disappearance makes them question what their son could be capable of.

programme.title: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: Seven guests, a newly hired personal secretary and two staff are gathered for a weekend on an isolated island by the hosts the Owens who are delayed. At dinner a record is played and the host's message alleges that all the people present are guilty of murder and suddenly the first of them is dead, then the next - It seems that one of them is the murderer but the leading person is always the person who is murdered next and at last only two people are left.

programme.title: Steve
programme.desc: If grinding in the bustling streets of NYC isn't enough for a Broadway actress, an uninvited guest in her apartment might be just the thing to put her over the edge.

programme.title: Phantom Ship
programme.desc: During a horrific storm at sea, the crew realizes that there is a murderer among them who is killing them off one by one.

programme.title: Silver On The Sage
programme.desc: Hoppy goes undercover as an Eastern gambler to rein in the fraternal perpetrators of a cattle-rustling scheme.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Maa Shakti
programme.desc: Maa Shakti who is known as the divine force in Hinduism. She is considered the source of power and creation and can transform herself into various forms

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Stories By Rabindranath Tagore
programme.desc: The Characters Of Tagore'S Stories Spring Into Life Through The Cinematic Imagination Of Acclaimed Filmmaker, Anurag Basu In ‘Stories By Rabindranath Tagore'.Tagore'S Words And Basu'S Vision Have Amalgamated Into A Show That Transports You Back In Time To A World As Complicated As This One But With Far More Appeal And Beauty.

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This Story Is About A 19Year Old Girl Named Chunari, Who Dreams Of Marriage And A Happy Family. However, She Becomes Entangled In The Chains Of Deceit, Finding Herself On The Path To Becoming A Dahej Daasi, Which Is A Tradition Still Prevalent In The Backward Regions Of Rajasthan. The Show Unfolds Into A Compelling Drama Of Tradition Versus Rebellion, Love Versus Oppression.

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The Story Highlights The Exploitation Happening With The ‘Bunkars' In Banaras, Whose Craft Is Appreciated All Around The World, But They Are Paid Peanuts By The Traders. Amidst This, Blooms A Love Story Between The Two Opposites – Gauri, A Bunkar And Garv, A Trader. The Story Is Of Gauri Who Belongs To The Bunkar Community Facing A Series Of Incidents That Destroy Her Family And Swears To Bring About A Change In Their Life And Stop The Exploitation By Directly Trading The Sarees. This Becomes A Battle With Traders Creating Hurdles In Her Life But She Is Unstoppable.

programme.title: Janani
programme.desc: When Children Are Young, Parents Care For Them And Give Them All They Need To Live A Good Life. The Circle Of Life, However, Means That One Day, It Is The Children'S Turn To Care For Their Parents And Give Them A Happy Retired Life. In The Current Moral Fabric Of Society, Rarely And Not Often It Works Out That Way. It Didn'T Happen That Way With Savita Too, As Her Children Had No Time To Look After Her. So She Decided Not To Settle Out And Reinvent Her Life. She Embarks On A Journey To Discover Herself And To Make Her Own Identity As An Individual. Janani Tells An Inspirational Story Of A Mother Who Rose Against All Odds And Became Successful.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Live Shows with Savannah
programme.desc: Savannah Zwi is a musician, actress, and artist.Through an innovative, educational experience, the productions expose children to the English language in an enchanting and inventive way. They encourage good moral values, creativity and using your imagination!Beautifully crafted sceneries transport the audience to magical realities and create fantastical memories! Stories are acted out in exquisite costumes with puppets and props which come to life before your eyes and encourage the viewer to use their imagination!The productions feature original handmade sets, captivating vocal performances of original music as well as loved Disney and musical theatre classics, cheeky puppet shows, and inventive storytelling. The Savannah Kids experience enlightens both the spirit and the soul, aiming to bond and delight families entrancing and entertaining, inspiring young minds.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Family Table
programme.desc: A family food game show wherein 2 families compete against each other by preparing their legacy dish. This is followed by celebrity guests presenting their own legacy dish, and challenging both the families to recreate the dish. The family which makes the best version wins an opportunity to dine with the celebrity guest, and celebrity chef Ranveer Brar.

programme.title: Tyohaar Ki Thaali
programme.desc: Sakshi Tanwar in Tyohaar Ki Thaali decides to celebrate one festival a week and along with the celebration, she also prepares two dishes from her mom's diary which is her prized possession. Along with preparing the dishes she also reminisces into the moments of how she celebrated some festivals and also shares some stories about the Gods.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Let's Brunch

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Host Mary Tang shows us some easy Chinese take-out dishes that are a true "wok" in the park! First, she rolls up some juicy wontons to douse in a bowl of hot seasoned chicken broth and delicious bok choy for a Chinese classic - Wonton Soup. Next, she gets out her frying pan for a crispy bowl of flavourful Chicken Chow Mein with egg noodles, savoury browned chicken, crunchy snow peas, and tasty baby corn. For an even simpler dish (and fan favourite), she then cooks up a hearty dish of Beef and Broccoli. Finally, Mary plays on different flavours with her Sweet and Sour Pork. Marinated pork cubes fried in a wonderful wok with fragrant garlic and ginger, sweet and tart red and green peppers, and succulent pineapple will definitely wake up your taste buds. (S3 E05)

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Noodles are a staple in Vietnamese cooking and host Lisa Nguyen showcases their versatility by starting off with fine vermicelli Stuffed Squid. Beautifully grilled and charred, these squid make great finger food. Lisa sticks to stuffing with her next dish - a Vietnamese favourite, Spring Rolls. Crunchy on the outside and filled with soft glass noodles, juicy ground pork, tender shrimp, and delectable crab meat on the inside, you're sure to be salivating at the sight of these tasty creations. Next on the menu, a Crispy Egg Noodle Pillow with a medley of vegetables and sauces on top. Lisa then finishes with a fun seafood and tomato soup make sure you try the yummy shrimp and delightful crab meringue topping! (S3 E12)

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!

programme.title: Novi Sad Synagogue, Serbia
programme.desc: Right in the city center of Novi Sad, Serbia, this crucial area, on Jevrejska Street – literally, Jewish Street - the synagogue of Novi Sad occupies a prominent spot both geographically as well as in the historical annals of the city.

programme.title: Voronezh town, Russia
programme.desc: In the southern part of Russia, by the river Voronezh, there is a city with the same name. It has a long history of remarkable men and women who prospered and fell here. The city fought for freedom countless times and brought a lot of talented artists to the world. It is a city of strong people and fantastic architecture. Voronezh was founded in 1585 when tsar Fyodor ordered to start the building of a new fortress on the Voronezh-river's bank to create a barrier from southern invasions. The fortress was finished around 1586 and defended Russians only for four years before it was burnt to the ground by cossacks.

programme.title: Nish Fortress & Bali-Beg Mosque, Serbia
programme.desc: Like many other cities that have a history going back hundreds of years, the southern Serbian city of Nish has a fortress in its center. The fortres sis also home to three large mosques built by the Turcs. The Bali Beg mosque is a unique monument to Islam"&"ic architecture in Serbia.

programme.title: Bosa Old town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: The beautiful Bosa Old Town finds itself in Alghero To Oristano, an area strongly influenced by Spanish culture. The city is generally considered to have been founded in 1102. However, long before the Christian era, the Phoenicians set up a trading post o"&"n this exposed bay in western Sardinia.

programme.title: Mir Castle Complex, Belarus
programme.desc: Located in the small town center, Mir Castle's complex is one of the earliest monuments to exist to this day and the most essential. This centuries-old Castle, reflected magnificently in an adjoining pond, resembles a building straight out of fairy tales. The common name 'mir' shared by the Castle and the town literally translates to 'peace' this justifies the fact that the Castle's sole purpose was built to bring harmony and peace to the region, followed by the signing of several peace treaties.

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Sveti Đorđe Island is one of the two islets off the coast of Perast in the Bay of Kotor, Montenegro. Unlike Gospa od Škrpjela, it is a natural island.

programme.title: Tauric Chersonesos, Crimea
programme.desc: 528 BC. in the west of the Heracles Peninsula, the Dorian Greeks founded the city of Chersonesus in Crimea, which means "peninsula". Founded as a colony of the wealthy Greek city of Heraclea of Pontus, its history is part of the Ancient Greece, Ancient Rome and Byzantium. In the Middle Ages, Chersonesus was called Kherson.

programme.title: Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, Italy
programme.desc: Hidden in the hills of Italy lies Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, the Ducal Palace of Urbino. It may seem strange to find such grand Renaissance architecture outside of the great cities. We all know about Rome, Venice, Florence and their great works. But the Ducal Palace of Urbino is often forgotten, despite rivaling all of them with its splendor and great history.

programme.title: Kursi, National Park, Israel
programme.desc: We are 30km west of Jerusalem, on the border between the Judean Mountains and the Ayalon Valley, in the village of Nicopolis. You may know it better as Emmaus. Here, thanks to its strategic position, Emmaus has played an important role in the country's administrative, military and economic life many times in its history.

programme.title: Marmashen Monastery, Armenia
programme.desc: Here we are: in a beautiful valley on the left bank of Akhurian River, 10 km northwest of the city of Gyumri, 2 km southwest of the village of Vahramaberd in the Shirak region in Armenia. We are at Marmashen Monastery. Surrounded by fruit orchards this magnificent monument once was a prominent cultural and religious center and is considered as the finest example of the medieval architecture of Armenia…

programme.title: San Nicolo dei Mendicoli, Italy
programme.desc: Venice, the dream city in the north of Italy! It is located on 118 islands in the Venetian lagoon, separated by 150 canals and channels with about 400 bridges. Known as the Floating City or the City of Canals, Venice is a true monument city. The church of"&" San Nicolo dei Mendicoli is a historical and artistic achievement, inseparable from the Venetian heritage.

programme.title: Traveling With Denella Ri'chard
programme.sub-title: St. Croix & St. John, U.S. Virgin Islands
programme.desc: Denella enjoys the delights of St Croix and St John in the US Virgin Islands. We learn about island-grown produce, local art, home-made beauty products, get a lesson in herbs and music, and discover a Crucian vodka that's helping save the world.

programme.title: Traveling With Denella Ri'chard
programme.desc: Watch Denella Ri'chard Explore Alaska. She interviews David Kasser, vice president of sales for Visit Anchorage, and Heather Dudick, account executive for the Alaska Railroad, to find out how visitors are choosing to experience Alaska these days.

programme.title: Traveling With Denella Ri'chard
programme.desc: The Exumas, The Bahamas' first natural marine sea park. Swim with the pigs or the sharks – if you DARE! In this episode, travel expert Denella Ri'chard explores this pristine chain of islands in The Bahamas archipelago via boat and ATV.

programme.title: Traveling With Denella Ri'chard
programme.sub-title: Come to the Virgin Islands: St. Thomas
programme.desc: Meet Denella Ri'chard. Denella is a sought after world traveler, Reconnect with paradise in the U.S. Virgin Islands as Denella explores the beautiful islands of St. Thomas & St. Croix.

programme.title: Antalya, Turkey
programme.desc: When King Attalos first set eyes on Antalya he called it “Paradise on Earth”. Its fertile soil and natural harbour made it favourable for settlers throughout the ages. Therefore Antalya has a rich cultural heritage with many remains of an outstanding hist"&"ory. The Persians, Alexander the Great, the Romans, the Arabs and many more have left their mark on the area over the centuries but no one more than King Attalos of Pergamon who in 159 B.C. gave the region its name Attaleia, which leaded to the modern nam"&"e Antalya....

programme.title: Pskov City, Russia
programme.desc: Pskov: One of the most beautiful and ancient cities located in the north-west of Russia on the Velikaya River! Only 20 kilometers from the Estonian border, church-studded city Pskov is dominated by its mighty riverside Kremlin: an enormous bulwark that ha"&"s faced up to its fair share of invading armies down the centuries.

programme.title: Sassi di Matera, Italy
programme.desc: Between the toe and heel of Southern Italy, there is the Basilicata region. This mountainous and arid landscape of the area has ensured a relatively sparse population and only in recent years has local infrastructure been developed. One of the larger popu"&"lation centers in this remote area is the unique and spectacular City of Sassi di Matera. Matera is internationally famed for its Sassi areas which have initially been prehistoric troglodyte settlements. The cavernous habitations were painstakingly dug ou"&"t of the soft calcareous rock, which is a characteristic of this part of Southern Italy.

programme.title: Voronezh Town, Russia
programme.desc: In the southern part of Russia, by the river Voronezh, there is a city with the same name. It has a long history of remarkable men and women who prospered and fell here. The city fought for freedom countless times and brought a lot of talented artists to "&"the world. It is a city of strong people and fantastic architecture. Voronezh was founded in 1585 when tsar Fyodor ordered to start the building of a new fortress on the Voronezh-river's bank to create a barrier from southern invasions. The fortress was f"&"inished around 1586 and defended Russians only for four years before it was burnt to the ground by cossacks.

programme.title: Saschiz Old Town, Romania
programme.desc: Saschiz, village, and commune, Mureș județ county is located in central Romania. The villages of Saschiz, Mihai Viteazu, and Cloașterf make up the larger commune of Saschiz. Located in the old region of Transylvania, it lies about 20 km east of Sighișoara"&". First documented in the 14th century, Saschiz is known for its medieval fortress and church constructed by Transylvanian Saxons, a German speaker. They settled in Transylvania when it was part of Hungary. The ruins of the 14th-century fortress sit atop "&"a hill overlooking the village. The late 15th-century fortified church has Gothic details and an imposing clock tower. Along with five other villages with fortified churches, Saschiz was inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage sites in 1999.

programme.title: Andros Town, Andros Island, Cyclades, Greece
